title: WorkletEffect
description: Base class for filters implemented as AudioWorkletProcessors. Subclasses declare the worklet's name, source code, and node options; this class owns the async lifecycle AND the dry/wet gain staging. Stable input/output nodes are created immediately. The worklet emits a pure wet signal; the base mixes it against the dry signal via `_dryGain`/`_wetGain` (`dryGain = 1 - wet`, `wetGain = wet * _wetMakeupGain`). An optional `_dryDelay` time-aligns the dry path with the worklet's algorithmic latency. While the worklet loads, the wet path is silent and dry passes at unity, so the effect is a clean passthrough (no volume dip) until it is ready.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Base class for filters implemented as AudioWorkletProcessors. Subclasses declare the worklet's name, source code, and node options; this class owns the async lifecycle AND the dry/wet gain staging.

Stable input/output nodes are created immediately. The worklet emits a pure wet signal; the base mixes it against the dry signal via `_dryGain`/`_wetGain` (`dryGain = 1 - wet`, `wetGain = wet * _wetMakeupGain`). An optional `_dryDelay` time-aligns the dry path with the worklet's algorithmic latency. While the worklet loads, the wet path is silent and dry passes at unity, so the effect is a clean passthrough (no volume dip) until it is ready.

members.name: _onWorkletReady
members.description: Subclass hook — called once the worklet is loaded and inserted into the wet path. Use for additional wiring (e.g. a sidechain input).

members.name: destroy
members.description: Disconnects all nodes, cancels any pending worklet load, and releases resources.

members.name: inputNode
members.description: The node where audio enters this effect.

members.name: outputNode
members.description: The node where audio exits this effect.

members.name: ready
members.description: Resolves once the worklet is loaded and inserted into the wet path.

members.name: wet
members.description: Wet (processed) mix level, 0..1. The dry level is automatically 1 - wet. Ramped smoothly.
